mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.course_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM t_paper p LEFT JOIN t_course c ON p.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN t_teacher t ON p.teacher_id = t.teacher_id WHERE p.paper_id = #{paperId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_paper (paper_name, course_id, teacher_id, total_score, duration, status, create_time) VALUES (#{paperName}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{totalScore}, #{duration}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_paper SET status = #{status} WHERE paper_id = #{paperId}
